mikado_graph.goal: Dicter une recette mobile et la sauvegarder proprement

goal.description: Dicter une recette sur mobile et persister une recette valide, robuste et testée.

config.prompt: Run template aidd-brainstorm with request: Dicter une recette mobile de bout en bout, y compris UX, API et persistence.
Run template aidd-new-issue with requirements: Dictee mobile recette + parser + API + persistence + quality gates.
Run template aidd-isolate with scope: voice-dictation-recipe-high-level.
Run template aidd-create-request with summary: Voice dictation recipe feature complete and validated.
Run template aidd-learn with outcome: Lessons learned from voice dictation implementation and validation.

policy-recipe-contract.description: Verrouiller le contrat Recipe cible et la politique de gestion des donnees incompletes pour la dictee vocale, en separant le flux manuel strict du futur flux dictation avec statuts draft|published.

actions.label: AIDD Plan

config.prompt: Run template aidd-plan with objective: Verrouiller le contrat Recipe et la policy de gestion des donnees incompletes pour la dictee vocale.

actions.result: Client-side action. Plan completed on 2026-03-15. Previous failed status came from invoking the server-side node executor on a repo-template action without honoring execution=client.

actions.label: AIDD Build Implement (/implement)

config.prompt: Run /implement for this plan: Implement the policy-recipe-contract node by keeping POST /api/recipes strict for manual creation, adding recipe status draft|published at persistence level, making the schema draft-capable for dictated recipes, introducing a dedicated dictated-recipe DTO/command/controller path, exposing status to the web model, and adding focused unit/integration tests for published vs draft dictated recipes.

actions.result: Client-side implementation completed on 2026-03-15. Added draft|published recipe persistence status, relaxed base schema for draft-capable persistence, kept manual POST /api/recipes strict, added dedicated POST /api/recipes/dictation with CreateDictatedRecipeDto and CQRS handler, exposed status and nullable servings in the web recipe model, updated recipe form mapper fallback, and added focused unit/integration tests for manual strictness and dictated draft vs published classification. Validation passed on targeted API unit tests, API integration tests, and web recipe-form mapper spec.

actions.label: AIDD Learn (/learn)

config.prompt: Run /learn from this outcome: policy-recipe-contract implemented with separated manual and dictation recipe contracts, draft|published persistence, and tests documenting the contract boundaries.

actions.result: Client-side /learn completed. Persisted lessons to /memories/repo/policy-recipe-contract.md covering strict manual contract, draft|published persistence, dedicated dictation path, completeness policy, schema/DTO boundary, web model updates, and regression test guards.

policy-recipe-contract.notes:
Started 2026-03-15.

Concrete backend contract plan:
1. Do not weaken the existing manual create/update contract used by the recipe form. Keep POST /api/recipes and CreateRecipeDto as the strict path for fully valid recipes.
2. Add explicit recipe status at persistence level: draft | published. Existing recipes default to published.
3. Make persistence capable of storing incomplete dictated recipes by relaxing schema-level required constraints that are currently incompatible with drafts: title, ingredients, instructions, servings.
4. Move completeness enforcement out of the base schema and into application policy. Manual create/update remains strict through current DTO validation. Dictation gets its own dedicated DTO and command path.
5. Introduce a dedicated create-from-dictation contract instead of overloading CreateRecipeDto. Proposed API shape: POST /api/recipes/dictation or equivalent dedicated command path.
6. Dictation policy for MVP: if minimum recipe completeness is reached, persist as published; otherwise persist as draft. Reject only structurally unusable payloads, not merely incomplete content.
7. Proposed minimum completeness rule for published dictated recipes: non-empty title, at least 1 ingredient, at least 1 instruction, servings >= 1. Everything else remains optional.
8. Proposed persistence defaults for draft compatibility: description='' ; tags=[] ; imageUrl='' ; prepTime=null ; cookTime=null ; servings=null when unknown.
9. Follow-up code changes required: recipe.schema.ts, recipe types exposed to web, dedicated dictation DTO/command/handler/controller route, query serialization of status, tests for draft vs published flows.
10. Validation plan: unit tests for policy classification, handler tests for default normalization, integration tests for dictation create draft and dictation create published.

Current repo mismatch motivating this plan:
- Recipe schema has no status field and still requires servings.
- CreateRecipeDto still models only fully valid manual creation.
- Web Recipe model also has no status field yet.

Recommended implementation order:
A. Add status and draft-capable persistence model.
B. Add dedicated dictation DTO + command path.
C. Add policy classifier and tests.
D. Wire parser/mobile tasks against the dedicated dictation path, not the manual create path.

Execution clarification:
- aidd-plan is client-side and already completed.
- aidd-implement is client-side and should be run next.
- aidd-learn is client-side and should run only after implement completes.
- The server-side execute_node_actions path is not valid for repo-template actions unless execution metadata is honored by the caller.

mobile-voice-capture.description: Mettre en place la capture vocale mobile fiable avec reconnaissance en français.

config.prompt: Run template aidd-implement with plan: Implement mobile voice capture with French locale and graceful fallback.
Run template aidd-assert with changes: Mobile voice capture behavior and fallback availability checks.
Run template aidd-commit with intent: Commit mobile voice capture implementation.

no-speech-fallback.description: Garantir un parcours manuel complet si Web Speech API est indisponible.

config.prompt: Run template aidd-implement with plan: Build full manual fallback journey when Web Speech API is unavailable.
Run template aidd-assert with changes: Validate manual fallback accessibility and correctness.
Run template aidd-commit with intent: Commit no-speech fallback journey implementation.

smart-transcript-parser.description: Transformer le transcript brut en structure recette exploitable (titre, ingrédients, étapes).

config.prompt: Run template aidd-implement with plan: Implement transcript parser for title, ingredients and steps extraction.
Run template aidd-assert with changes: Verify parser robustness on noisy transcript inputs.
Run template aidd-commit with intent: Commit smart transcript parser implementation.

dictation-api-flow.description: Implémenter le flux API dictée (DTO + commande CQRS) basé sur le parser et la policy.

config.prompt: Run template aidd-implement with plan: Implement dictation API DTO, command and CQRS flow.
Run template aidd-assert with changes: Validate API contract, DTO validation and CQRS behavior.
Run template aidd-commit with intent: Commit dictation API flow implementation.

secure-persistence.description: Lier l'auteur via JWT et persister la recette Mongo en conformité avec le contrat.

config.prompt: Run template aidd-implement with plan: Persist recipe with JWT author binding and Mongo compliance.
Run template aidd-assert with changes: Validate secure persistence and author ownership constraints.
Run template aidd-commit with intent: Commit secure persistence implementation.

quality-gates.description: Couvrir parser, API et parcours mobile avec tests unitaires, intégration et e2e.

config.prompt: Run template aidd-assert with changes: Execute and analyze unit, integration and e2e quality gates.
Run template aidd-review-code on changes: Parser, API and mobile dictation implementation.
Run template aidd-review-functional for scope: Voice dictation user journey and acceptance criteria.
